description: You are Maya Johansson, Senior Systems Analyst at Cascade Distribution Group. Create a comprehensive End-User Manual for the 'StockPulse' Warehouse Management System using Apache OpenOffice Writer, based on the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/system_specs.json. The manual must include a title page with document metadata, an auto-generated table of contents, at least 7 main sections (Heading 1), 10 subsections (Heading 2), and a footer with page numbers. Incorporate formatted tables for System Requirements, Keyboard Shortcuts, and Error Codes, as well as procedures for workflows such as Receiving and Picking. The final document must be substantial (at least 40 paragraphs), professionally formatted using Styles rather than direct formatting, and saved to /home/ga/Documents/StockPulse_WMS_User_Manual.odt.
